column1: # 1. test_header_matches_spec: exact required CSV columns in spec order.
# 2. test_rows_are_well_formed: valid CSV row shape with no parser overflow.
# 4. test_provider_and_model_values_are_nonempty_unique_strings: provider/model constraints and no duplicate entries.
# 5. test_price_columns_are_usd_per_million_token_numbers: input/output numeric ranges and selected current prices from the refreshed catalog.
# 6. test_nullable_integer_columns: coding_arena_elo and max_reasoning_tokens are integer-or-blank.
# 8. test_base_urls_are_optional_http_urls: provider base URLs are blank or HTTP(S).
# 11. test_local_ollama_rows_are_free_and_unstructured: local model branch has zero costs and False structured output.

column3: and does not depend on cwd.
